summary: Task 2 CRUD modules end-to-end frontend testing on preview URL. Verified all 9 CRUD modules (Kategori, Supplier, Lokasi, Barang/Products, Barang Masuk/StockIn, Barang Keluar/StockOut, Maintenance, Reports, AI Recommendation) plus sidebar navigation and flash messages. Stock In/Out business logic (atomic stock increment/decrement/adjust/revert on create/edit/delete) verified against Laptop stock (original=12, all transitions correct). Total ~75 assertions ran across 6 playwright runs — 100% functional pass rate (all initial FAILs were test-script issues: wrong testid names or wrong option values, corrected on retest).
critical_code_review_comments: Product/Category/Supplier/Location forms use consistent `x-form-input` component with data-testid=`input-{name}` and `x-form-textarea` uses `textarea-{name}` — both patterns are documented but not the same prefix; testing agents may need to know both. Not a bug.
Product filter status option values are short-form: `low` and `out` (not `low_stock`/`out_of_stock`). Consider aligning with more descriptive values or documenting in a schema.
Sidebar logout is a form with `<button type="submit">`. Broad selectors like `button[type=submit]` in a Playwright script can inadvertently log the user out. Not a bug but a testing footgun.
Product delete uses browser's native confirm() — confirm dialog was auto-accepted via page.on("dialog") handler. Consider a shadcn-style AlertDialog for better UX (native confirm is discouraged).
AI recommendation main card exposes ai-recommendation-card wrapping 7 children (verified >= 3 required).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all functional assertions pass after test-script corrections)

test_credentials: admin@demo.com / password (Admin) — VERIFIED. Not tested manager/staff in this iteration.
seed_data_creation: No net data added. Created & fully deleted throughout tests: CAT-QA-001, SUP-QA-001, LOC-QA-001, PRD-QA-001 product, 1 Laptop stock-in tx, 1 Laptop stock-out tx, 1 QA maintenance ticket. DB left in original demo state.

detailed_results.sidebar: All 10 modules linked (dashboard, master-barang, kategori, supplier, lokasi-gudang, barang-masuk, barang-keluar, maintenance, reports, ai-recommendation). Zero disabled/'soon' badges. Active state highlights current module (indigo gradient).
detailed_results.categories: 5 seed rows verified. Create → flash 'Kategori berhasil ditambahkan.' → Edit persists → Duplicate code 'CAT-ELC' → server-side validation error 'The Kode has already been taken.' shown in [data-testid=error-code] with rose colour → Delete works.
detailed_results.products: 12 seed rows, pagination 'Showing 1 to 10 of 12 results' with page numbers 1|2. Category filter=Elektronik works. Status filter values are `low`/`out` (not low_stock/out_of_stock). Monitor LG appears under `low`, Mouse Wireless under `out`. Search=Laptop works. Full CRUD pass with SKU=PRD-QA-001.
detailed_results.stock_in_business_logic: Laptop original stock=12. Create qty=5 → stock=17. Edit qty=5→10 → stock=22 (net +10, not +15 – transaction adjusted correctly). Delete → stock reverted to 12. All three transitions atomic and correct.
detailed_results.stock_out_business_logic: Excess-qty validation returns [data-testid=error-quantity] with text 'Stok tidak mencukupi. Sisa stok: 12 unit' – matches spec. Valid qty=2 → stock 12→10. Delete → stock reverted to 12.
detailed_results.maintenance: 8 seed tickets. Filter status=pending returns 4, in_progress=1, priority=high=2. Create auto-generates ticket_no (matches /MNT-\d{6,}/ pattern). Edit status→completed auto-fills completed_at with today's date (2026-07-07 verified). Delete works.
detailed_results.reports: All 4 KPI cards visible (report-stat-in/out/value/mnt). All 3 sections present (report-topout, report-stock-by-cat, report-mnt-status). Date filter from=2026-06-01 to=2026-06-30 applies via querystring; date inputs echo values back correctly.
detailed_results.ai_recommendation: ai-recommendation-card with 7 children (≥3 required). ai-outofstock-card lists Mouse Wireless. ai-lowstock-card lists Monitor/Pulpen. ai-deadstock-card present. Restock link on out-of-stock item correctly navigates to /stock-ins/create.
detailed_results.flash_messages: [data-testid=flash-status] green box appears after every successful create/edit/delete across all modules (e.g. 'Kategori berhasil ditambahkan.', 'Barang berhasil dihapus.', 'Lokasi berhasil dihapus.').

context_for_next_testing_agent: Task 1 (Dashboard/Auth) & Task 2 (all 9 CRUDs) fully passing. Task 3 (if any) can build on top. NOTE for future scripts: (1) product filter status uses `low`/`out` not `low_stock`/`out_of_stock`. (2) textarea fields use testid `textarea-{name}` not `input-{name}`. (3) Sidebar logout button has type=submit — do NOT use broad `button[type=submit]` selectors; always use data-testid. (4) Delete confirmation is native browser confirm() — must attach page.on('dialog', lambda d: d.accept()) at start of every playwright run. (5) Stock In/Out uses DB transactions; stock arithmetic verified end-to-end.
